---
title: "Miscellaneous"
description: "Community service, scientific organization, and outreach activities."
page-layout: full
css: assets/css/misc.css
---

::: {.misc-page}

## Community service and organization

::: {.service-grid}

::: {.service-card}
### Physical Networks Satellite

**Role:** Organizer  
**Period:** 2024--2025 (NetSci25), 2025--2026 (NetSci26)  

PhysNet is a NetSci satellite that brings together researchers working on physical networks from diverse tangible complex systems. 
I co-organize the Physical Networks satellites at NetSci25 & NetSci26.

[Website](https://jym16.github.io/physnet-satellite/){.service-link}
:::

::: {.service-card}
### Data Stories

**Role:** Organizer  
**Period:** 2024--2025  

Data Stories is a data visualization and storytelling workshop series organized by student volunteers in the Department of Network and Data Science at CEU. I co-organize the 11th edition of the workshop.

[Website](https://networkdatascience.ceu.edu/data-stories){.service-link}
:::

::: {.service-card}
### Japanese Researcher Network in Austria

**Role:** Organizer / coordinator  
**Period:** 2025--present  

This initiative aims to connect Japanese researchers based in Austria and to support academic exchange, information sharing, and community building across institutions.

[Mailing list](https://groups.google.com/g/ja-researchers-in-at){.service-link}  
[Website](https://jpn-aut-research.github.io/){.service-link}
:::

:::

:::
